name: @dripl/db
description: Database layer with Prisma ORM for Dripl

scripts.build: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); let s = false; for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) { try { execSync('npx prisma generate', { stdio: 'inherit' }); s = true; break; } catch(e) { console.log('Retrying prisma generate...'); } } if (!s) process.exit(1);" && tsc -b --force
